title: Wooden cog
body:
Woodencog is a compatibility mod for create.
This mod allow the player to automate almost every aspect of TFC with create. We intend to do the whole compatibility layer, then allow pack makers and players to edit crafts and systems as they like with datapacks or kubejs.

This mod will probably break tfc progression and allow big skips into it as itself. That's why I don't really recommend using it as it is when it's finished but see it as a tool to build your own modpack with things that you couldn't do with just datapacks. We still intend to do some balancing, but it will be easier to finish TFC with it. As of now, this mod contains :

- every alloy can be made in a basin (with some black magics and bug fixing you can now input 4 fluids into basins)
- Temperature of item can be handled with fans (heating and cooling)
- Charcoal forge can be accessed by a mechanical arm (thanks [SeriousCreeper](https://www.youtube.com/@SeriousCreeper))

feel free to try it and give us feedback.
